message:
chore: bump version to 0.4.4 for release

Identical binary to 0.4.3. This release picks up installer and tooling
improvements that ship via the install.sh script (not compiled into the
binary): sync_system_service() auto-detects systemd services pointing
to a different binary path and updates them, pre-commit hook for
rustfmt, and ExecStart=- prefix handling fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "storage_ballast_helper"
-version = "0.4.3"
+version = "0.4.4"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "System service that prevents disk-full scenarios from coding agent swarms via ballast files, artifact scanning, and special location monitoring."
